name: Insta360 X4 Thermo Grip Cover
description: Custom-fit to the Insta360 X4, this Thermo Grip Cover secures to the camera and reduces surface temperature so you can shoot 8K video for longer. The grip is designed to protect your hand during operation.

features.Key Features: Attaches to X4 Camera | Reduces Surface Temperature | Improves Handheld Operation | Polycarbonate and PCM Materials
features.What's In The Box: Insta360 Thermo Grip Cover for X4
